examples: Q. 3 Why did Paul send out Timothy to the church of Thessalonians?
The news brought him by Timothy was the occasion of I Thessalonians.
Let's back up again and say now so what did Paul teach to the Thessalonians?
This would have astounded Walton, an amiable and modest man of pious interests, for whom "Study to be quiet" (1 Thessalonians 4:11) was a favored motto.
